title: Three Column Cards
heading: Parallel pillars
subtitle: Three balanced columns for capabilities, strategies, issues, opportunities, or risks.

cards.title: Structured expression
cards.description: Split peer-level ideas into columns instead of a long list.

cards.title: Balanced density
cards.description: Keep each card focused on one short explanation.

cards.title: Easy extension
cards.description: Extend into more groups or split into follow-up slides.

summary: Best for three parallel ideas; avoid using it for single-thread narratives or complex matrices.
